review_title: You want to optimize your blended ROAS or POAS based on data you trust? Look no further.
author: David A.
pros: Most importantly: our marketing team finally has a source of truth for improving our campaigns and channel mix, based on data we trust. Their algorithm is transparent and their dashboards give us crucials insights. Also on data quality. Their new web UI is also very fast and more intuitive. Customer support is outstanding.
cons: there are definitely some features I'm still missing, but their development is astoninglishly fast in releasing new ones regularly

review_title: Finally a single source of truth
description: Overall, my experience with this software has been very positive as it significantly improved my daily workflow and decision-making process regarding marketing investments. The insights gained have empowered me to optimize campaigns more efficiently than ever before!
author: Zahari D.
pros: What I like best about this software is that it provides a single source of truth for the performance of our online marketing channels. I no longer need to prove that Facebook or TikTok Ads work; it's clear by looking at their ROAS and comparing it to other channels under the same attribution model. Additionally, the ability to consider both click and view conversions has demystified the performance of paid social channels, allowing me to evaluate upper-funnel strategies effectively.
cons: There are some aspects I like least about this software. One limitation is that there's no option to create more custom reports, which would be beneficial for building quarterly or yearly closings and comparing key KPIs over time in a table format. Furthermore, while the attribution comparison feature exists, it only shows absolute numbers without providing context against costs or impressions—this can make deeper analysis challenging.

review_title: I was okay with the free trial!
author: Monica H.
pros: The pros were the free trial, of course and the overall ease of access!
cons: The cons could have been a longer free trial!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Essential tool for full funnel optimizatio
description: My overall experience with this software has been positive; it has streamlined many aspects of my daily work routine and reduced manual analysis time significantly. With better optimization capabilities at hand, I'm confident in making smarter investment choices moving forward.
author: Joram D.
pros: What I like best about this software is that it provides us with data that can't be found elsewhere. The insights into return on ad spend (ROAS) have been invaluable, allowing us to make more informed decisions regarding our budget allocation across various campaigns. Additionally, the transparency it offers in tracking customer journeys has significantly improved our understanding of how different channels contribute to conversions. What I like least about this software is that it still doesn't work 100% correctly for us.
cons: We face challenges in differentiating between proofs (like sample cards, which could be seen as lead generation) and final orders, which are our real conversions; currently, they are all categorized the same way. Furthermore, while we appreciate its capabilities, there’s a need for a clearer overview dashboard for paid campaign KPIs to enhance usability.

description: Overall great value for money! Kickbite is not standing still and rolling out new features frequently. They have fantastic customer support and really listen to feedback that gets build into the product. Would definitely recommend!
author: Sandrik K.
pros: Helped us delve deeper into the data, looking beyond the standard metrics (revenue, ROAS etc) by focusing more on new vs returning revenue, CAC, and POAS and help better understand which channels drive those metrics the most.
cons: Difficult at first to integrate into daily workflows (requires new way of thinking, and setting up new reporting structure). Once it is your new ' source of truth', you'll discover it is well worth it!

review_title: I like and use it so much more than GA4
description: I really appreaciate the customer service. They helped me many times figure out what is wrong with my tracking or why data is off.
author: Daniela C.
pros: I love that I have one dashboard with all performance channels and an attribution model that treats them all equally (unlike GA4 that is famous for favoring Google channels). Also, the new dashboard is super intuitive. It is easy to filter out channels, compare campaigns, get useful graphs. Kickbite has been a real game changer for optimising the social media channels of some clients with longer customer journeys.
cons: There are some small details about the interface (like for example comparison vs previous period is only shown in percentages and not in real numbers). Also, we cannot track custom events yet (but we have been promised this would change soon). Still, I think that kickbite does great job.

description: The experience with Kickbite is good and we are looking forward to continue working with them.
author: Felix K.
pros: We are pleased to work with Kickbite. The onboarding, the tool and the service are great! The team is eager to fulfill our wishes and requests are getting implemented swiftly.
cons: The tool build on Power BI and that is hindering usability a bit, but the team will launch their own platform soon. For instance you can not pre-select time frames such as "last 30 days".

description: Great. Awesome team with great support.
author: Andrej B.
pros: Great attribution modelling with amazing customer support.
cons: Goes more into the direction of SaaS rather then self-service
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool for your KPI set and Attribution Measurement
author: Edwin D.
pros: Easy dashboard to check the growth of audience and to see the performance of our campaigns.
cons: Don't have really cons beside that you can't really integrate it into your own dashboard.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The team of Kickbite is really open and eager to offer you the best user experience possible. They even extended the features of the data analyses when we discussed different view options. Great team, great tool - highly recommended!
author: Jo W.
pros: In-depth insights into data, including customer journeys and cohorts.
cons: We highly appreciate the openness to extend the features that we discuss in our check-ins.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Die Implementierung von Kickbite war sehr schnell und das Onboarding wurde hervorragend unterstützt. Insgesamt hat sich unsere Marketingeffizienz deutlich verbessert.
author: Lisa K.
pros: Endlich mit einem Klick eine klare Übersicht über unsere Performance des Brand Shops und unseren Kampagnen. Ich schätze besonders die Möglichkeit, genau zu sehen, wie die einzelnen Kampagnen und Channels laufen, was es mir ermöglicht, unser Budget gezielt anzupassen. Zudem haben wir durch das transparente Preismodell und die individuelle Anpassbarkeit des Tools einen echten Mehrwert erhalten
cons: Mir fehlt noch folgendes: Eine detaillierte Analyse der LTV (Lifetime Value) und Retention Rate wäre wünschenswert. Außerdem gab es einmal eine Skalierungsprognose, die uns helfen könnte zu erkennen, welche Kampagne wir skalieren sollten. Auch eine tiefere Einsicht auf Creative-Ebene würde den Nutzen der Software weiter steigern.

review_title: Klasse Attribution Tool für ecommerce Insights
description: Meine allgemeine Erfahrung mit Kickbite ist durchweg positiv; das Tool hat uns geholfen, unsere ROAS signifikant zu verbessern und bessere Kampagnenassets zu entwickeln. Die Demokratisierung der Daten innerhalb des Teams fördert zudem eine kollaborative Arbeitsweise.
author: Hendrik W.
pros: :** Was mir an Kickbite am besten gefällt, ist die Möglichkeit, schnellere und informiertere Entscheidungen zu treffen. Die Software ermöglicht es uns, unsere Budgetplanung und Kampagnenaktivitäten effizienter zu steuern. Zudem schätze ich die High-Level-Übersicht, die einen klaren Überblick über unsere Marketingmaßnahmen bietet und den Austausch mit den Teams erleichtert.
cons: Was mir an Kickbite am wenigsten gefällt, ist der Umstand, dass ein einmalig ausgewählter Betrachtungszeitraum beim Wechseln zwischen den Ansichten nicht voreingestellt bleibt. Dies kann manchmal etwas umständlich sein und erfordert zusätzliche Anpassungen. Außerdem wäre eine noch tiefere Analyse einzelner Aktionen wünschenswert.

review_title: Effiziente Kampagnenoptimierung mit einem klaren Überblick
description: Meine allgemeine Erfahrung mit Kickbite ist durchweg positiv; das Tool hat meinen Arbeitsalltag deutlich erleichtert und ermöglicht eine präzisere Budgetverteilung. Die schnelle Integration dank des kompetenten Onboardings war ein weiterer Pluspunkt.
author: Vivienne W.
pros: Am besten gefällt mir, dass ich durch die Software einen sauberen Einblick in unsere Channel- und Kampagnen-Performance erhalte. Dies ermöglicht es mir, konkrete und fundierte Maßnahmen abzuleiten, die auf realistischen Daten basieren. Die Möglichkeit, den Einfluss von Upper-Funnel-Kanälen besser zu verstehen, hat meine Entscheidungsfindung erheblich verbessert.
cons: Was mir an Kickbite am wenigsten gefällt, ist das Fehlen einer Übersicht in der neuen Dashboard-Version, die zeigt, wie sich eine Skalierung bei Google Ads-Kampagnen auswirken könnte. Diese Funktion war in der Power BI Version sehr hilfreich für uns. Zudem wäre es wünschenswert, wenn einige Reporting-Funktionen noch weiter optimiert werden könnten.

review_title: Präzise Kampagnensteuerung und klare Insights für unser Marketing
description: Meine allgemeine Erfahrung mit Kickbite war durchweg positiv. Die einfache Bedienbarkeit und die klare Dashboard-Struktur haben unsere tägliche Routine stark verbessert.
author: Katrin F.
pros: Was mir an Kickbite am besten gefällt, ist die präzise Nachverfolgung der Umsätze aus verschiedenen Kanälen. Die Software ermöglicht eine zielgenaue Kampagnen-Nachverfolgung und zeigt klar auf, welche Kampagnen erfolgreich sind. Zudem erleichtert sie den Kanalvergleich sowie den Wechsel zwischen Attributionsmodellen erheblich.
cons: Was mir an Kickbite am wenigsten gefällt, ist, dass ich keine spezifischen Verbesserungsvorschläge habe. Es gibt nichts Wesentliches zu kritisieren; alles funktioniert einwandfrei. Ich hätte mir vielleicht noch mehr individuelle Anpassungsmöglichkeiten gewünscht.
